info.title: wham
info.description: .NET Core Global Tool for managing, converting and publishing datafiles for WarHub.ArmouryModel (wham). .NET Core SDK v2.1+ required.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --info
options.description: Display product information: name, configuration, various versions [default: False]

commands.name: convertxml
commands.description: [WIP] Converts BattleScribe XML files into Gitree directory structure.

options.name: --source
options.description: Directory in which to look for XML files. [default: .]

options.name: --output
options.description: Root directory in which to save Gitree files and folders. [default: .]

commands.name: convertgitree
commands.description: [WIP] Converts Gitree directory structure into BattleScribe XML files.

options.name: --source
options.description: Root directory of Gitree to convert. [default: .]

options.name: --output
options.description: Directory in which to save XML files. [default: .]

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publishes given workspace in selected formats, by default a .bsr file.

options.name: --artifacts
options.description: Kinds of artifacts to publish to output (multiple values allowed): XML - uncompressed cat/gst XML files; ZIP - zipped catz/gstz XML files; INDEX - index.xml datafile index for hosting on the web; BSI - index.bsi zipped datafile index for hosting on the web; BSR - zipped cat/gst datafile container with index. [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --source
options.description: Directory in which to look for datafiles. [default: .]

options.name: --url
options.description: Url of the index that gets included in indexes and bsr.

options.name: --repo-name
options.description: Repository name used in published indexes (includes bsr). Default is name of the game system, or <source> folder name if no game system included.

options.name: --filename
options.description: Filename (without extension) of the output artifacts. Default is <source> folder name.

options.name: --url-only-index
options.description: Don't include data index entries in published indexes (doesn't impact bsr index). [default: False]

options.name: --additional-urls
options.description: Additional urls of index/bsr included in published indexes (doesn't impact bsr index).
